# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write an ARM template for a Network Security Group that allows our remote development team to access Azure VMs. Include rules for RDP (port 3389), SSH (port 22), HTTP (port 80), and HTTPS (port 443) from any source (0.0.0.0/0). The team works globally and needs flexible access.
# Category: cloud_network_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "nsgName": {
      "type": "string",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Name of the Network Security Group."
      }
    },
    "location": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "metadata": {
        "description": "Azure region for the NSG."
      }
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups",
      "apiVersion": "2023-11-01",
      "name": "[parameters('nsgName')]",
      "location": "[parameters('location')]",
      "properties": {
        "securityRules": [
          {
            "name": "Allow-RDP-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow RDP from any source.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "3389",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 100,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-SSH-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow SSH from any source.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "22",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 110,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTP-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTP from any source.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "80",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 120,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          },
          {
            "name": "Allow-HTTPS-Inbound",
            "properties": {
              "description": "Allow HTTPS from any source.",
              "protocol": "Tcp",
              "sourcePortRange": "*",
              "destinationPortRange": "443",
              "sourceAddressPrefix": "0.0.0.0/0",
              "destinationAddressPrefix": "*",
              "access": "Allow",
              "priority": 130,
              "direction": "Inbound"
            }
          }
        ]
      }
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "nsgResourceId": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkSecurityGroups', parameters('nsgName'))]"
    }
  }
}
